Package org.rodinp.internal.core.util.sort

Class Sorter<T,N extends INode<T,N>>

java.lang.Object
org.rodinp.internal.core.util.sort.Sorter<T,N>
Type Parameters:
T - type of node labels
N - type of nodes
public class Sorter<T,N extends INode<T,N>> extends Object
Implementation of a topological sort for INode.
